case_title: GLORIA HUNNIECUTT et al VS. TAMI AVILES et al

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $200 SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Inspection Demand; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, tentative ruling WAS adopted AS FOLLOWS. Defendant's motion to compel responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $200 shall be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported. (610/BEC)
